title: Russian Beef Skewers
description: A flavorful and savory beef skewer recipe inspired by Russian cuisine. Perfect for a delicious dinner or outdoor gathering.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together paprika, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
4. Thread the beef, onion, bell pepper, tomato, and garlic onto the skewers.
5. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef reaches 160°F.
7. Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
8. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
9. Serve hot with your favorite sides.
